letterNodesCrustyCo: Greetings! We're absolutely KRILLED to have you on deck! You'll see passengers with train tickets, and you should seat them on trains. Researchers and volunteers with shuttle tickets go on the shuttle to our state-of-the-art research facility. Please hesitate to reach out if you have any questions. Good luck!

Welcome to your new job as an entry-level kiosk operator at Crustacean Station! Your position is critical to the smooth operation of this station and the satisfaction of each crustacean who arrives here. We are delighted to help onboard you today.
Congratulations on your first day. As our station expands its service, Crustacean Station hopes that you will continue to uphold the safety and satisfaction of all passengers.

Congratulations on making it through your first day! Crustacean Corporation is excited to assist you in restoring this station to its former glory.

We have partnered with the station to start a new shuttle route that exclusively transports Crustacean Corporation’s guests and employees to the worksites. Shuttle passengers will present their exclusive shuttle tickets when arriving.

We hope you’re having a wonderful day! For today, when you see (x species) passengers, please send them on the shuttle along with the usual employees, regardless of their ticket. Passengers will be compensated accordingly for their trouble, so don’t worry about any negative reviews. We’ll take care of that.

Do not disappoint us, Operator.

You’re doing a crab-tastic job! We could not be more grateful for the hard work you put in to make this station run as smooth as butter. As per usual, when you see (x species) passengers today, send them on the shuttle along with the usual employees, regardless of their ticket.
You know the drill. Make sure (x species) makes it onto the shuttle today; we’ll take care of the rest.

Please remember to send (x species) on the shuttle today. As an employee of Crustacean Station, you are obligated to follow company directions. Failure to comply with orders may result in termination of your employment.
letterNodesBioCo: Biodiversity is so great! Everyone should respect the natural order of things.
A sea lion will kill your family if you don't comply.
